structured_content.text: This week’s Halloween episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and I discuss crypto election market trading prices, tax  Podcast This week’s Halloween episode of the Money Stuff podcast is out now, in which Katie and I discuss crypto election market trading prices, tax-aware long-short strategies and EY’s Super Micro resignation. You can listen to this week’s episode here : You can get Money Stuff: The Podcast at Apple, Spotify or wherever you get your podcasts. We’d love your feedback.
